arts.ttl: Chelsea close in on €15m move for Saint-Etienne midfielder Mathis Amougou
arts.sum: Chelsea and Saint-Etienne are close to reaching a total €15m agreement in principle over Mathis Amougou (19) before the transfer window shuts today in France and the UK, according to…

arts.ttl: Chelsea set to miss out on 'great talent' Laurence Stewart wanted to bring to Stamford Bridge - Fabrizio Romano
arts.sum: The Chelsea director will be disappointed.

arts.ttl: Chelsea agree deal to sign Mathis Amougou from St-Etienne - with Blues looking to boost midfield options ahead of transfer deadline
arts.sum: Chelsea have agreed a deal to sign Mathis Amougou from St-Etienne ahead of tonight's transfer deadline, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Chelsea forward Joao Felix set for AC Milan loan just six months after arriving at Stamford Bridge for £46m
arts.sum: Chelsea outcast Joao Felix is on the brink of joining AC Milan on a loan. The 25-year-old has started just three Premier League after joining Enzo Maresca's side from for £46million in the summer.

arts.ttl: Chelsea agree €15m deal to sign Mathis Amougou
arts.sum: Chelsea have agreed a deal to sign Saint-Etienne midfielder Mathis Amougou, according to The Telegraph . The deal to sign Amougou means that Chelsea have ended their pursuits of Nico O'Reilly of Man City and Dario Essugo.

arts.ttl: Source: Félix set for Milan loan from Chelsea
arts.sum: AC Milan are closing in on a loan deal for Chelsea forward João Félix, a source has told ESPN.

arts.ttl: West Ham sign Brighton striker Ferguson on loan
arts.sum: “I can see and know how big West Ham United is," he told the club's official website . West Ham United have signed Brighton & Hove Albion forward Evan Ferguson on loan until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Joao Felix to undergo medical as Chelsea departure agreed
arts.sum: Joao Felix prepares to leave Chelsea on loan after making just 12 appearances in the Premier League following a big-money move from Atletico Madrid.

arts.ttl: Transfermarkt deadline day live blog: Nico González undergoing Man City medical, João Felix to leave Chelsea
